seoTitle: Neville vs New Brighton — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Neville and New Brighton. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Neville vs New Brighton: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Neville and New Brighton.
heading: Neville vs New Brighton — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Neville, New South Wales and New Brighton, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: New Brighton has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Neville (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Neville or New Brighton safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Neville has a flood risk score of 20/100, while New Brighton scores 34/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Neville scores 43/100 for bushfire risk. New Brighton scores 37/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Neville or New Brighton?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. New Brighton has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.35% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
